queries.question: What restaurants serve Italian cuisine and what cafes serve the same cuisine?
queries.sql:
SELECT Restaurants.Name 
FROM Restaurants
WHERE (Restaurants.Food_Service = "Restaurant" OR Restaurants.Food_Service = "Café") AND Restaurants.Cuisine = "Italian"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?restaurants a :Restaurants .
  ?restaurants p:name ?name .
  ?restaurants p:Food_Service ?food_service_w .
  ?restaurants p:Food_Service ?food_service_w2 .
  ?restaurants p:Cuisine ?cuisine_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?food_service_w) = "Restaurant" || STR(?food_service_w2) = "Café")) && STR(?cuisine_w) = "Italian"))
}

queries.question: List all restaurants and also list cafes that serve Italian cuisine.
queries.sql:
SELECT Restaurants.Name 
FROM Restaurants
WHERE Restaurants.Food_Service = "Restaurant" OR Restaurants.Food_Service = "Café" AND Restaurants.Cuisine = "Italian"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?restaurants a :Restaurants .
  ?restaurants p:name ?name .
  ?restaurants p:Food_Service ?food_service_w .
  ?restaurants p:Food_Service ?food_service_w2 .
  ?restaurants p:Cuisine ?cuisine_w .
  FILTER((STR(?food_service_w) = "Restaurant" || (STR(?food_service_w2) = "Café" && STR(?cuisine_w) = "Italian")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me restaurants and cafes that serve Italian cuisine.
